title: placeholder feature where data/image get replaced
author: ThunderBird201516
body: As a user, I have an excel template and added some common placeholders on every excel page. I want to replace those placeholders with my given set of data or images on every page, where ever it is present.

comments.author: alexey2baranov
comments.body: also vote for extended template features like  `if-else` and `foreach in array`
